utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan contains all 5 of these items. Each item is fully detailed with coverage details and associated costs. Health coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs and coverage specifics; travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs and detailed coverages; additional_services are listed with costs and descriptions; total_budget includes a complete monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all 5 required items are present and fully specified.
